Our proven heat treatment and chemical methods eliminate bed bugs at all life stages, protecting your home and family.

faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Tremont?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Tremont typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method. Multi-room apartments and severe infestations require more extensive treatment. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Tremont homes?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and targeted chemical applications using EPA-approved products. Heat treatment raises room temperatures to levels that kill bed bugs and eggs instantly, while chemical treatments provide residual protection. Our technicians assess your specific situation to recommend the most effective approach for your Tremont residence.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Tremont apartment?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Tremont apartments take 4-8 hours depending on the size and infestation level. Heat treatments are typically completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require 2-3 visits spaced weeks apart. We work efficiently to minimize disruption and provide detailed preparation instructions beforehand.

faqs.question: Do you serve all of Tremont including buildings near Crotona Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide bed bug treatment throughout all of Tremont, including areas near Crotona Park, along East Tremont Avenue, around Arthur Avenue, and throughout the residential streets between Webster and Prospect Avenues. We serve single-family homes, apartment buildings, and multi-unit complexes across the entire neighborhood.
